attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SIEURBH.IAM_USER_ID, 
SIEURBH.ROLE_ID, 
SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME, 
SIEURBH.TOOL_ID, 
SIEURBH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE, 
SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER, 
SIEURBH.ERP_SEGMENT1, 
SIEURBH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE, 
SIEURBH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG, 
SIEURBH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG, 
SIEURBH.RESTRICTION_FLAG, 
SIEURBH.PROXY_FLAG, 
SIEURBH.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID, 
SIEURBH.GRANTOR_CEC_ID, 
SIEURBH.GRANTOR_CCO_ID, 
SIEURBH.STATUS, 
SIEURBH.TR_FLAG, 
SIEURBH.LAST_ACTION, 
SIEURBH.CREATED_BY, 
SIEURBH.CREATE_DATE, 
SIEURBH.UPDATED_BY, 
SIEURBH.UPDATE_DATE, 
SIEURBH.ACTION_CODE, 
SIEURBH.BATCH_ID, 
SIEURBH.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_BE_HIER SIEURBH
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
	ON (SIEURBH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID 
		AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
	ON SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURBH.IAM_USER_ID 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION NIA
	ON SIEURBH.TOOL_ID= NIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_ENTITY NBE
	ON NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME=SIEURBH.ERP_SEGMENT1	
WHERE  SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER=1
	AND SIEURBH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_BIZ_ENT'
	AND (IAC.TOOL_ID IS NULL 
		OR NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NULL
		OR NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT IS NULL
		OR NIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IS NULL
		OR  NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME IS NULL)

SELECT
SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
NIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
SIEURBH.ERP_SEGMENT1  AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
'I' AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD,
SIEURBH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
SIEURBH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS  ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD ,
SIEURBH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
                                               WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
END  AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_BE_HIER SIEURBH
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
                ON (SIEURBH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID 
                                AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
                ON SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
                ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURBH.IAM_USER_ID 
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION NIA
                ON SIEURBH.TOOL_ID= NIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
WHERE SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER=0 
                AND SIEURBH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_BIZ_ENT' 
                                
UNION ALL

SELECT
SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
NIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
SIEURBH.ERP_SEGMENT1  AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
'E' AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD,
SIEURBH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
SIEURBH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD ,
SIEURBH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
                                               WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
END  AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_BE_HIER SIEURBH
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
                ON (SIEURBH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID 
                                AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
                ON SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
                ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURBH.IAM_USER_ID 
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION NIA
                ON SIEURBH.TOOL_ID= NIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
WHERE SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER=0 
                AND SIEURBH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_BIZ_ENT'

SELECT			
SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,			
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,			
NIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,			
NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,			
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,			
SIEURBH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,			
SIEURBH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS  ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD ,			
SIEURBH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,			
CASE WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'			
 			WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
END  AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,			
SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,			
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,			
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,			
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,			
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,			
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,			
'I' AS DML_TYPE			
FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_BE_HIER SIEURBH			
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC			
	ON (SIEURBH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID 		
		AND IAC.STATUS ='A')	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR			
	ON SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME		
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU			
	ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURBH.IAM_USER_ID 		
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION NIA			
	ON SIEURBH.TOOL_ID= NIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT		
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_ENTITY  NBE			
	ON SIEURBH.ERP_SEGMENT1 = NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME		
WHERE SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER=1			
	AND SIEURBH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_BIZ_ENT' AND 1=2
UNION ALL
SELECT			
SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,			
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,			
NIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,			
NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,			
NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD AS BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD,			
NSBE.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME    AS BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME   ,   --CFDD 
SIEURBH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,			
SIEURBH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS  ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD ,			
SIEURBH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,			
CASE WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'			
 			WHEN SIEURBH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
END  AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,			
SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,			
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,			
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,			
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,			
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,			
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,			
'I' AS DML_TYPE			
FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_BE_HIER SIEURBH			
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC			
	ON (SIEURBH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID 		
		AND IAC.STATUS ='A')	
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR			
	ON SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME		
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU			
	ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURBH.IAM_USER_ID 		
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION NIA			
	ON SIEURBH.TOOL_ID= NIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT		
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_ENTITY  NBE			
	ON SIEURBH.ERP_SEGMENT1 = NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME		
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY  NSBE
	ON NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME = NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
	AND NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD=NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD
WHERE SIEURBH.LVL_NUMBER=1			
	AND SIEURBH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_BIZ_ENT' 
  AND NOT EXISTS(select 1 from $$WORKDB.W_IAM_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK NIBEL
  WHERE  NIBEL.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME=SIEURBH.ROLE_NAME
  AND   NIBEL.IAM_USER_KEY=NIU.IAM_USER_KEY
  AND   NIBEL.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=NIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
  AND   NIBEL.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME= NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
  AND     NIBEL.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD=NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD)
